His behaviour in the society . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 239 7 .1 His refutation of the belief in raj 'ah . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 239 7.2 His meeting people's needs ......................... 240 7.3 His marriage to the daughter ofTall).ah ibn 'Ubaydullah .. 242 7.4 His marriage to Khawlah bint Mandhoor .............. 243 7 .5 He did not see the Mothers of the Believers without their veils . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 244 7.6 His great care to refrain from abusing his connection to the Prophet(~) ................................ 244 7. 7 He offered the funeral prayer for al-Ash'ath ibn Qays. . . . 245 7 .8 How he treated those who mistreated him . . . . . . . . . . . . . 245 7.9 His etiquette in gatherings. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 246 7 .10 His good attitude with the people . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 246 7 .11 His playing with stones . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 24 7 7 .12 His avoidance of excessive speech . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 24 7 7.13 His honouring Usamah ibn Zayd ................... 248 7.14 His explanation to the poor Jew .................... 248 7.15 lbn 'Abbas' respect for al-I;Iasan and al-I;Iusayn ....... 249 7.16 'Abdullah ibn az-Zubayr's praise for al-I;Iasan ........ 250

Contents 7 .17 The relationship between al-l:fasan and al-l:fusayn . . . . . 251 7 .18 The one with the noblest parents, grandparents, aunts and uncles . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 251 7.19 People's love for him and his brother al-l:fusayn, and how they crowded around them at the Kaaba . . . . . . 252
content_id: Perilaku beliau dalam masyarakat. 7.1 Bantahan beliau terhadap kepercayaan raj'ah. 7.2 Kepedulian beliau dalam memenuhi kebutuhan orang lain. 7.3 Pernikahan beliau dengan putri Thalhah ibn Ubaydullah. 7.4 Pernikahan beliau dengan Khawlah bint Mandhoor. 7.5 Beliau tidak pernah melihat para Ummahatul Mukminin tanpa hijab. 7.6 Kehati-hatian beliau dalam menjaga hubungannya dengan Nabi ﷺ. 7.7 Beliau mensalati jenazah Al-Asy'ats ibn Qays. 7.8 Cara beliau memperlakukan orang yang menyakitinya. 7.9 Etika beliau dalam majelis. 7.10 Sikap beliau yang baik terhadap sesama. 7.11 Kebiasaan beliau bermain dengan batu kerikil. 7.12 Beliau menghindari bicara berlebihan. 7.13 Penghormatan beliau kepada Usamah ibn Zayd. 7.14 Penjelasan beliau kepada seorang Yahudi yang miskin. 7.15 Penghormatan Ibn Abbas terhadap Al-Hasan dan Al-Husain. 7.16 Pujian Abdullah ibn az-Zubayr terhadap Al-Hasan. 7.17 Hubungan antara Al-Hasan dan Al-Husain. 7.18 Beliau adalah orang dengan orangtua dan kakek-nenek paling mulia. 7.19 Kecintaan orang-orang kepada beliau dan saudaranya Al-Husain, serta bagaimana mereka berkerumun di sekitar keduanya di Ka'bah.
